problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 191: Assume statements are allowed only in component types
problems.cause: AGREE annex is attached to ADIRU.EMV2, which is a system implementation, not a component type
problems.minimal_edit: Move the entire annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2 to ADIRU

problems.cause: C1 is a connection, not a boolean expression; => operator requires boolean operands
problems.minimal_edit: Remove assume statements for C1, C2, etc., as connections cannot be used as boolean conditions in AGREE

problems.cause: acc_pr.acc1_output is a port, not a visible AGREE expression; ports are not directly addressable in component type AGREE without intermediate variables
problems.minimal_edit: Remove all port references (acc_pr.acc1_output, acc_pr.acc2_output) as they are not legal in AGREE contracts at this scope

problems.cause: main_cpu is a subcomponent of ADIRU.impl, not visible in ADIRU component type scope
problems.minimal_edit: Remove all 'acc_pr = main_cpu.part1' etc. bindings, since subcomponent references are not visible in component type contracts

executor_steps: Delete the entire annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2
Create a new annex agree block in ADIRU (component type) with no content, since no valid assumptions can be expressed with visible symbols
Verify that all port and subcomponent references in the original annex are removed, as they are not legal in component type AGREE contracts
